examples: They were failing lamentably to help their sons grow from boyhood to manhood.
We deplore this lamentably ill-advised decision.
Lamentably, rich creditor countries, such as Germany, are doing much less.
Lamentably, the financial crisis and the Bernard Madoff scandal convinced many to steer clear of advisors.
But that disguises the very basic sense in which RBS's response has been lamentably poor.
